utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five keys. Now check if each is fully specified per the required details: - health_coverage: The format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' The plan provides 'physical' and 'mental' each with a named plan and monthly cost. This is fully specified. - property_coverage: The format requires 'home/contents insurance with costs.' The plan states 'Not applicable (not requested by user)', which does not meet the requirement to include coverage with costs. Not fully specified. - travel_coverage: The format requires 'travel insurance with costs.' The plan provides a named travel plan and monthly cost. Fully specified. - additional_services: The format requires 'any enhancement services with costs.' The plan lists 'Adventure Travel Coverage - €80/month.' Fully specified. - total_budget: The format requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' The plan provides monthly and annual totals. Fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Adventure Travel Coverage (add-on). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, primary_health_coverage.mental_health, mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, and travel_enhancement_services, respectively. Then I extracted their exact numeric ratings.
